mapper.select: SELECT SVC_NAME, MIKEP_DOC_NO, SVC_DAYS, CON_MTH, EVALUATION, EVC_TEC, EVC_PRC, BID_TND_NO, PQ_NO, ELG_NO, CON_NO, AFTER_TASK, TO_CHAR(REGI_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID, RELATED_LIC FROM BIZ_SVC WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND TASK_TYPE = #{taskType} AND TASK_CODE = #{taskCode}

SELECT ORDER_NO, MIKEP_DOC_NO, CONTRACTOR, CON_AMT, TO_CHAR(SVC_START, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SVC_START, TO_CHAR(SVC_END, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SVC_END, CON_NO, TO_CHAR(REGI_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID FROM BIZ_SVC_CON WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND TASK_TYPE = #{taskType} AND TASK_CODE = #{taskCode} ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
mapper.update: MERGE INTO BIZ_SVC T USING DUAL ON ( T.MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND T.TASK_TYPE = #{taskType} AND T.TASK_CODE = #{taskCode} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MIKEP_DOC_NO = #{mikepDocNo}, SVC_DAYS = #{svcDays}, CON_MTH = #{conMth}, EVALUATION = #{evaluation}, EVC_TEC = #{evcTec}, EVC_PRC = #{evcPrc}, BID_TND_NO = #{bidTndNo}, PQ_NO = #{pqNo}, ELG_NO = #{elgNo}, CON_NO = #{conNo}, AFTER_TASK = #{afterTask}, RELATED_LIC = #{relatedLic}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPWRITER_ID = #{upwriterId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MASTER_NO, TASK_TYPE, TASK_CODE, SVC_NAME, MIKEP_DOC_NO, SVC_DAYS, CON_MTH, EVALUATION, EVC_TEC, EVC_PRC, BID_TND_NO, PQ_NO, ELG_NO, CON_NO, AFTER_TASK, RELATED_LIC, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID) VALUES (#{masterNo}, #{taskType}, #{taskCode}, #{taskName}, #{mikepDocNo}, #{svcDays}, #{conMth}, #{evaluation}, #{evcTec}, #{evcPrc}, #{bidTndNo}, #{pqNo}, #{elgNo}, #{conNo}, #{afterTask}, #{relatedLic}, SYSDATE, #{inwriterId})

MERGE INTO BIZ_LIC T USING DUAL ON ( T.MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND T.TASK_TYPE = #{taskType} AND T.TASK_CODE = #{taskCode} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET LIC_ORG = #{licOrg}, MIKEP_DOC_NO = #{mikepDocNo}, LIC_DATE = #{licDate}, PIC_NAME = #{picName}, PIC_POS = #{picPos}, PIC_TEL = #{picTel}, PIC_EMAIL = #{picEmail}, AFTER_TASK = #{afterTask}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPWRITER_ID = #{upwriterId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MASTER_NO, TASK_TYPE, TASK_CODE, LIC_NAME, LIC_ORG, MIKEP_DOC_NO, LIC_DATE, PIC_NAME, PIC_POS, PIC_TEL, PIC_EMAIL, AFTER_TASK, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID) VALUES (#{masterNo}, #{taskType}, #{taskCode}, #{taskName}, #{licOrg}, #{mikepDocNo}, #{licDate}, #{picName}, #{picPos}, #{picTel}, #{picEmail}, #{afterTask}, SYSDATE, #{inwriterId})

MERGE INTO BIZ_SPC T USING DUAL ON ( T.MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND T.TASK_TYPE = #{taskType} AND T.TASK_CODE = #{taskCode} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET EFFECTIVE_DATE = #{effectiveDate}, AFTER_TASK = #{afterTask}, MIKEP_DOC_NO = #{mikepDocNo}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPWRITER_ID = #{upwriterId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MASTER_NO, TASK_TYPE, TASK_CODE, TITLE, EFFECTIVE_DATE, AFTER_TASK, MIKEP_DOC_NO, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID) VALUES (#{masterNo}, #{taskType}, #{taskCode}, #{taskName}, #{effectiveDate}, #{afterTask}, #{mikepDocNo}, SYSDATE, #{inwriterId})

MERGE INTO BIZ_CSV T USING DUAL ON ( T.MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND T.TASK_TYPE = #{taskType} AND T.TASK_CODE = #{taskCode} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET EFFECTIVE_DATE = #{effectiveDate}, AFTER_TASK = #{afterTask}, MIKEP_DOC_NO = #{mikepDocNo}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPWRITER_ID = #{upwriterId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MASTER_NO, TASK_TYPE, TASK_CODE, TITLE, EFFECTIVE_DATE, AFTER_TASK, MIKEP_DOC_NO, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID) VALUES (#{masterNo}, #{taskType}, #{taskCode}, #{taskName}, #{effectiveDate}, #{afterTask}, #{mikepDocNo}, SYSDATE, #{inwriterId})

MERGE INTO BIZ_SVC_CON T USING DUAL ON ( T.MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND T.TASK_TYPE = #{taskType} AND T.TASK_CODE = #{taskCode} AND T.ORDER_NO = #{orderNo} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MIKEP_DOC_NO = #{mikepDocNo}, CONTRACTOR = #{contractor}, CON_AMT = #{conAmt}, SVC_START = #{svcStart}, SVC_END = #{svcEnd}, CON_NO = #{conNo}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPWRITER_ID = #{upwriterId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MASTER_NO, TASK_TYPE, TASK_CODE, ORDER_NO, MIKEP_DOC_NO, CONTRACTOR, CON_AMT, SVC_START, SVC_END, CON_NO, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID) VALUES (#{masterNo}, #{taskType}, #{taskCode}, #{orderNo}, #{mikepDocNo}, #{contractor}, #{conAmt}, #{svcStart}, #{svcEnd}, #{conNo}, SYSDATE, #{inwriterId})
